title: Update Settings
description: Configure the Sales Navigator Companies Scraper settings

content.introduction: Configure your Sales Navigator Companies Scraper settings. Control pagination depth and result limits.

rows.description: Maximum number of search result pages to scrape (max: 100)
Maximum companies to collect per task (max: 5000)
Maximum unique results across all tasks in the run

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.content:
Sales Navigator displays 25 companies per page. With `max_pages` set to 100 (default), you can collect up to 2,500 companies per search URL.

For larger datasets, use multiple search URLs with different filters.

proTips.content: Set `max_pages` to a lower value if you only need companies from the first few pages of results.
Credits are charged per company collected (1 credit per company).

seo.title: Update Settings - Sales Navigator Companies Scraper - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to configure Sales Navigator Companies Scraper settings using the Lobstr.io API.
